goal: Register missing security migrations and fix code warnings from review

tasks.name: Register 3 missing security migrations in master changelog
tasks.action: Add includes for security/005-seed-admin-user.yaml, security/006-add-member-id-to-users.yaml, security/007-create-refresh-tokens.yaml after the existing security/004 entry. Order matters: 005 seeds admin user (depends on user_accounts), 006 adds member_id FK (depends on members table), 007 creates refresh_tokens (depends on user_accounts).

tasks.name: Fix SecurityConfig JSON interpolation and refresh endpoint error leaking
tasks.action: In SecurityConfig: replace String.format JSON templates with Jackson ObjectMapper or manually escape authException.getMessage() and accessDeniedException.getMessage() (replace quotes with \\" before interpolation). In AuthController refresh endpoint: replace e.getMessage() with a generic 'Invalid or expired refresh token' message, matching the static-message pattern used in the login endpoint.

tasks.name: Remove unused OAuth2 config from application.yml
tasks.action: Remove the oauth2.client.web-app.secret and oauth2.client.batch-client.secret properties. Keep oauth2.jwt.rsa.* properties (still used by JwtService).

commitMessage: fix(auth-hardening): register missing migrations and fix security code warnings
